title: Humanity - SolarSMP
description: The official modpack used for the Architiverse.
body:
Humanity is modpack crated purely to represent the difficulties that Humans experienced early in development.

- Biblical References
- Steampunk Tech
- Best played with friends.

This modpack features a well-planned storyline that guides players through the events of my original Humanity Project. Forge and fabric mods are mixed into this pack to allow a wide variety of expandability in every direction.

The pack's variety of mods range from small kitchensink mods all the way to mods like Create which have been carefully configured to allow for a much more genuine experience.
